Visit Us

We are located in Woodstock, in the heart of the Hudson Valley. Everyone is welcome.

Get in touch

Address

28 River Bend Lane
Woodstock, NY 12498

Phone

(845) 555-0174

Email

info@stillwaterdharma.org

Centre Hours

Mon–Fri 10am–6pm · Sat–Sun 9am–5pm

Thursday evening sitting: 6:00–7:30pm (free, no booking required)

28 River Bend Lane
Woodstock, NY 12498

Open in Google Maps ↗

Getting Here

By car: From New York City, take I-87 North (New York State Thruway) to Exit 20 (Saugerties). Follow Route 212 west into Woodstock, then turn onto River Bend Lane. Approximately 2 hours from the city.

Parking: Free on-site parking for up to 20 vehicles.

By bus: Trailways offers service from Port Authority Bus Terminal to Woodstock. We can arrange pickup from the Woodstock stop — call ahead.

Stillwater Dharma Center

A non-sectarian centre for meditation and contemplative practice,
open to all, rooted in kindness.

28 River Bend Lane, Woodstock, NY 12498
